item.title: 「豆包手机二代」努比亚 Navi X Ultra 现身 WAIC
item.guid: 「豆包手机二代」努比亚-Navi-X-Ultra-现身-WAIC
item.description:
At the WAIC event, Nubia Navi X Ultra debuted as the "Doubao Phone 2.0," featuring the Doubao Phone Assistant. This phone adopts a front and rear flat design with a straight-edge middle frame. The rear camera module has been changed from the irregular triangle of the previous generation Nubia M153 to a horizontal integrated design. WAIC 现场，努比亚 Navi X Ultra 作为搭载豆包手机助手的「豆包手机 2.0」亮相。这款手机采用前后直板设计和直边中框，后置镜组从上一代努比亚 M153 的不规则三角形改为横向贯穿式设计。

Navi X Ultra integrates the Doubao Phone Assistant deeper into the system. The assistant will gain deeper system invocation permissions and combine with Nubia's hardware and interactive design, allowing users to directly state their goals, which the AI agent will understand and complete by invoking phone functions. Navi X Ultra 将豆包手机助手更深地接入系统。助手将获得更深的系统调用权限，并与努比亚的硬件及交互设计结合，用户可以直接提出目标，由 AI 智能体理解任务并调用手机功能完成操作。

According to "LatePost," the new generation of Doubao phones no longer operates applications by reading the screen and simulating clicks, but instead accesses MCP services provided by the applications themselves. 据《晚点 LatePost》报道，新一代豆包手机不再采用读取屏幕，模拟点击的方式操作应用，转向接入应用自行提供的 MCP 服务。

The stock of the new generation of Doubao phones has increased from the previous 30,000 units to hundreds of thousands of units. "Phones cannot forever remain in the technical experimental stage; ultimately, they have to be sold," said a person close to Doubao Phone. 新一代豆包手机的备货量从此前的 3 万台提升到了数十万台，「手机不可能永远只停留在技术实验阶段，最终还是得卖出去。」一位接近豆包手机人士说。

item.title: 苹果上调 Apple Music 价格
item.guid: 苹果上调-Apple-Music-价格
item.description:
Today, Apple announced price increases for Apple Music in the U.S.: the individual plan monthly fee will increase from $10.99 to $11.99, the family plan from $16.99 to $19.99, and the student plan from $5.99 to $6.99. 今天，苹果宣布美国 Apple Music 涨价：个人版月费从 10.99 美元提高到 11.99 美元，家庭版从 16.99 美元提高到 19.99 美元，学生版从 5.99 美元提高到 6.99 美元。

Apple Music in mainland China also saw synchronous price increases: the individual plan from 11 yuan/month to 12 yuan/month; the family plan from 17 yuan/month to 20 yuan/month; and the university student plan from 6 yuan/month to 7 yuan/month. 国区 Apple Music 同步涨价，个人版从 11 元/月提高到 12 元/月；家庭版从 17 元/月提高到 20 元/月；大学生版从 6 元/月提高到 7 元/月。

This is the first price increase for Apple Music since the fall of 2022, with Apple attributing the adjustment to rising music licensing costs. 这是 Apple Music 自 2022 年秋季以来首次涨价，苹果把调整归因于音乐授权成本上升。

item.title: 智谱 ARR 被曝达到 10 亿美元，半年增长 15 倍
item.guid: 智谱-ARR-被曝达到-10-亿美元，半年增长-15-倍
item.description:
Smart Emergence cited multiple independent sources stating that as of July 2026, Zhipu's Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) has reached $1 billion. Insiders said that the company's ARR grew 15-fold from January to July, taking approximately 5 months to increase from $100 million to $1 billion. 智能涌现援引多个独立信源称，截至 2026 年 7 月，智谱的年度经常性收入（ARR）已达到 10 亿美元。知情人士称，公司 1 月至 7 月的 ARR 增长了 15 倍，从 1 亿美元增至 10 亿美元用了约 5 个月。

The report links the growth to the programming business: Zhipu has focused on improving the Coding and Reasoning capabilities of its models since early 2025. In the first quarter of this year, GLM API prices cumulatively increased by about 83%, with overseas subscription prices approaching Claude Code, and invocation volume still growing by approximately 400%. 报道将增长与编程业务联系起来：智谱自 2025 年初集中提升模型的 Coding 与 Reasoning 能力，今年一季度 GLM API 价格累计上调约 83%，海外订阅价格接近 Claude Code，调用量仍增长约 400%。

item.title: 小米 SU7 虚假碰撞测评博主一审获刑一年八个月
item.guid: 小米-SU7-虚假碰撞测评博主一审获刑一年八个月
item.description:
The Haidian District People's Court of Beijing recently issued a first-instance judgment in the case of self-media blogger Gao damaging product reputation. The court found that Gao fabricated and disseminated false facts, intentionally damaging the reputation of Xiaomi SU7 products, constituting the crime of damaging product reputation, and sentenced him to one year and eight months in prison, along with a fine of 100,000 yuan. 北京市海淀区人民法院近日对自媒体博主高某损害商品声誉案作出一审判决。法院认定，高某捏造并散布虚假事实，故意损害小米 SU7 商品声誉，构成损害商品声誉罪，判处有期徒刑一年八个月，并处罚金 10 万元。

The video in question was released in August 2024, showing a collision test between a Xiaomi SU7 and another brand's vehicle. The report stated that business personnel from the team involved had previously indicated that the estimated cost of a single collision test exceeded one million yuan, and the goal of making the video included gaining followers through content. Xiaomi reported the case in November 2024, and subsequently disclosed in January 2025 that the involved blogger and their accomplices had been apprehended according to law. 涉案视频于 2024 年 8 月发布，内容为小米 SU7 与另一品牌车型进行碰撞测试。报道称，涉案团队商务人员此前曾表示，一次碰撞试验的估算成本超过百万元，制作视频的目标包括通过内容涨粉。小米于 2024 年 11 月报案，随后在 2025 年 1 月披露，涉案博主及其同伙已被依法缉拿归案。

Xiaomi's legal department stated in a Weibo post yesterday that the "test" methods and conclusions in the video contained serious errors and biases, causing a negative impact online and damaging Xiaomi's commercial reputation. Xiaomi stated that it will continue to protect its rights and reputation through legal channels in the future. 小米法务部昨日发布的微博称，该视频的「测试」方法及结论存在严重谬误与偏颇，在网络上造成恶劣影响，并损害小米公司的商业信誉。小米表示，未来将继续通过法律途径维护公司权益和声誉。

item.title: Shopify CEO：反 AI 编程的人严重高估了人类代码质量
item.guid: Shopify-CEO：反-AI-编程的人严重高估了人类代码质量
item.description:
Shopify co-founder and CEO Tobi Lütke posted that people who oppose AI programming severely overestimate the quality of human code. Elon Musk later replied "True," expressing agreement. Shopify 联合创始人兼 CEO Tobi Lütke 发帖称，反对 AI 编程的人严重高估了人类代码的质量。马斯克随后回复「True」，表示认同。

He stated that apart from a few excellent open-source projects and high-quality enterprise codebases, a large amount of "human garbage code" is widespread, and any Opus-level model can easily improve this type of code. 他表示，除少数优秀开源项目和高质量企业代码库外，大量「人类垃圾代码」普遍存在，任何达到 Opus 级别的模型都能轻松改进这类代码。

Lütke's view sparked discussions about AI programming reliability and code ownership. Some users believe that the issue is not just code quality, but that developers might lose control over the codebase; in contrast, low-quality code written by humans can usually at least be understood by some developer. Lütke 的观点引发了关于 AI 编程可靠性和代码所有权的讨论。有用户认为，问题并不只是代码质量，而是开发者可能失去对代码库的控制；相比之下，人类编写的低质量代码通常至少能被某位开发者理解。

Some users also pointed out that AI-generated "garbage code" shares similarities with model hallucinations; the code might appear cleaner on the surface but still requires manual review and debugging. 也有用户指出，AI 生成的「垃圾代码」与模型幻觉存在相似之处，代码表面上可能更整洁，但仍需要人工审查和调试。

item.title: 影石与荣耀达成影像生态合作，计划年底前进驻 300 家荣耀门店
item.guid: 影石与荣耀达成影像生态合作，计划年底前进驻-300-家荣耀门店
item.description:
On July 17, Insta360 announced an imaging ecosystem partnership with Honor. Insta360's flagship products will first enter 44 Honor official authorized experience stores nationwide this July, covering core business districts in regions like Beijing, Shenzhen, Shandong, Hebei, and Shanghai, with plans to enter 300 Honor stores by the end of this year. 7 月 17 日，影石宣布与荣耀达成影像生态合作。影石系列旗舰产品将于今年 7 月率先入驻全国 44 家荣耀官方授权体验店，覆盖北京、深圳、山东、河北、上海等区域的核心商圈，并计划在今年年底前进入 300 家荣耀门店。

Insta360's current products cover categories such as panoramic cameras, action cameras, handheld gimbal cameras, drones, video conferencing cameras, and microphones. After entering Honor stores, the two parties will create offline experience scenarios centered around the integration of smart imaging and AI terminals. 影石目前的产品覆盖全景相机、运动相机、手持云台相机、无人机、视频会议相机及麦克风等品类。入驻荣耀门店后，双方将围绕智能影像与 AI 终端融合打造线下体验场景。

item.title: 复旦团队实现室温单电子非易失存储
item.guid: 复旦团队实现室温单电子非易失存储
item.description:
The team of Zhou Peng and Liu Chunshen from Fudan University published research on "quantum flash memory" in "Science." Utilizing two-dimensional semiconductors and coplanar drain-channel-source structures, they observed single-electron non-volatile storage at room temperature (27℃): each injected electron corresponds to one bit, with a memory window reaching 0.5 volts. 复旦大学周鹏、刘春森团队在《Science》发表「量子闪存」研究，利用二维半导体与共面的漏极—沟道—源极结构，在 27℃ 室温下观测到单电子非易失存储：每注入一个电子即可对应一个比特，存储窗口达到 0.5 伏特。

The team stated that the device has advanced the 55 mV, approximately 5-second retention of 1997 silicon-based single-electron memory to stable storage at room temperature, and has completed prototype verification compatible with CMOS silicon processes. The next step will be to promote large-scale chip integration, with plans to launch products with AI clients within 1 to 3 years. 团队称，该器件把 1997 年硅基单电子存储的 55 mV、约 5 秒保持推进到室温稳定保存，并已完成与 CMOS 硅工艺兼容的原型验证。下一步将推进大规模芯片集成，计划在 1 至 3 年内对接 AI 客户实现产品落地。

item.title: 油电平权再进一步，新能源车可靠性试验里程拟统一提高到 3 万公里
item.guid: 油电平权再进一步，新能源车可靠性试验里程拟统一提高到-3-万公里
item.description:
According to Yicai, the National Automotive Standardization Technical Committee recently solicited opinions on amendments to three recommended national standards, proposing to uniformly increase the total reliability test mileage for pure electric, hybrid, and fuel cell vehicles to no less than 30,000 kilometers, consistent with the requirements for traditional fuel vehicles. 据第一财经报道，全国汽车标准化技术委员会近日就三项推荐性国家标准修改单征求意见，拟把纯电动、混合动力和燃料电池汽车的可靠性行驶试验总里程统一提高到不低于 3 万公里，与传统燃油车的要求一致。

The current standard for pure electric vehicles was formulated in 2005, with reliability test mileage executed at 50% of the corresponding fuel vehicle standard; referring to this year's access requirements for road motor vehicle manufacturers, it is usually 15,000 kilometers. After this revision, the test mileage for pure electric vehicles will double, with the cumulative DC charging mileage accounting for no less than 90%, i.e., at least 27,000 kilometers. 现行纯电动车标准制定于 2005 年，可靠性试验里程按对应燃油车标准的 50% 执行；参照今年道路机动车辆生产企业准入要求，通常为 1.5 万公里。本次修改后，纯电动车试验里程将翻倍，其中直流充电累计里程占比不得低于 90%，即至少 2.7 万公里。

In addition to completing the 30,000 km total test, plug-in hybrid electric vehicles also need to complete a separate pure electric reliability test of at least 10,000 km; fuel cell vehicles must complete the full 30,000 km in hybrid drive mode. The three amendments also update the safety requirements for hybrid vehicles to GB 18384 "Safety Requirements for Electric Vehicles," which came into effect on July 1. 插电式混合动力汽车除完成 3 万公里总试验外，还需单独完成至少 1 万公里纯电可靠性试验；燃料电池汽车则要在混合动力驱动模式下完成全部 3 万公里。三项修改还把混动车安全要求更新为 7 月 1 日实施的 GB 18384《电动汽车安全要求》。

item.title: Netflix 营收增速降至 3 年来最低，股价盘中一度跌 8%
item.guid: Netflix-营收增速降至-3-年来最低，股价盘中一度跌-8%
item.description:
Netflix yesterday released its Q2 2026 earnings report. Data showed that the company's net profit for the quarter was $3.4 billion, a year-on-year increase of over 9%; revenue grew by 13.4% year-on-year to $12.56 billion, but this was the lowest growth rate in 3 years and slightly below analysts' expectations. Affected by the performance and outlook guidance, Netflix's stock price once fell by 8% during trading. Netflix 昨日公布 2026 年第二季度财报。数据显示，公司当季净利润为 34 亿美元，同比增长超过 9%；营收同比增长 13.4% 至 125.6 亿美元，但增速为 3 年来最低，并略低于分析师预期。受业绩及前景指引影响，Netflix 股价盘中一度下跌 8%。

Netflix expects Q3 revenue growth to further slow to 11.7%, exacerbating investor concerns about user engagement and business growth. The company stopped reporting subscriber numbers starting from Q1 2025, citing the high volatility of this metric. Netflix stated that users cumulatively watched approximately 97 billion hours of content in the first half of this year, a 2% year-on-year increase. Netflix 预计，第三季度营收增速将进一步放缓至 11.7%，加剧投资者对用户参与度和业务增长的担忧。公司自 2025 年第一季度起不再公布订阅用户数量，理由是该指标波动较大。Netflix 表示，今年上半年用户累计观看内容约 970 亿小时，同比增长 2%。

Data from research firm Digital i shows that YouTube surpassed Netflix in 2025 to become the platform with the longest average daily watch time; eMarketer also pointed out that since 2024, American adults' time spent on TikTok has approached that on Netflix. 研究机构 Digital i 的数据显示，YouTube 在 2025 年已超过 Netflix，成为平均每日观看时间最长的平台；eMarketer 则指出，自 2024 年起，美国成年人在 TikTok 上花费的时间已接近 Netflix。

item.title: 月之暗面联合创始人周昕宇：Kimi 暂不开发视频生成模型
item.guid: 月之暗面联合创始人周昕宇：Kimi-暂不开发视频生成模型
item.description:
Zhou Xinyu, co-founder and head of the algorithm team at Moonshot AI, posted on X that Kimi currently has no plans to develop video generation models. The team is currently focusing its resources on improving the upper limit of the model's intelligence, rather than following the competitive pace of video generation products. 月之暗面联合创始人、算法团队负责人周昕宇在 X 发文表示，Kimi 目前没有开发视频生成模型的计划。团队现阶段把资源集中在提升模型的智能上限，而不是跟随视频生成产品的竞争节奏。

Zhou Xinyu believes that while video generation has clear uses, from a theoretical and practical perspective, it does not significantly help improve model intelligence. He separates capability enhancement from functional expansion: generating videos can add an output form, but it is not the main path, in the team's current judgment, to continue advancing reasoning and task capabilities. 周昕宇认为，视频生成虽然有明确用途，但从理论和实际效果看，对提升模型智能的帮助都不大。他把能力提升与功能扩展分开：生成视频可以增加一种输出形态，却不是团队当前判断中推动推理和任务能力继续上升的主要路径。

Kimi K3's public capabilities also continue this choice, focusing on software engineering, knowledge work, deep reasoning, and image understanding. The multimodal approach currently leans more towards enabling the model to understand images and use them for reasoning, rather than directly generating video content. Kimi K3 的公开能力也延续这一选择，重点放在软件工程、知识工作、深度推理和图像理解。多模态路线目前更偏向让模型理解图像并用于推理，而非直接生成视频内容。

item.title: Netflix 联席 CEO Ted Sarandos：生成式 AI 已进入约 300 部作品的制作流程
item.guid: Netflix-联席-CEO-Ted-Sarandos：生成式-AI-已进入约-300-部作品的制作流程
item.description:
According to IndieWire, Netflix co-CEO Ted Sarandos stated in his public remarks during the Q2 earnings call that approximately 300 Netflix productions in 2026 have already used generative AI, focusing on pre-visualization, visual effects, scene references, and post-production. 据 IndieWire 报道，Netflix 联席 CEO Ted Sarandos 在二季度财报电话会的公开发言中表示，2026 年已有约 300 部 Netflix 作品使用生成式 AI，集中在前期预演、视觉特效、场景参考和后期制作。

"The American Experiment" has 17 minutes of footage enhanced by AI, and some projects use it to expand crowd scenes and historical battle shots. 《The American Experiment》有 17 分钟画面经过 AI 增强，部分项目用它扩展群众场面和历史战役镜头。

Sarandos divided these uses into two categories: one helps teams see creative prototypes faster, and the other is used to complete shots previously limited by budget, filming conditions, or VFX timelines. He said that low-budget productions can therefore also try visual solutions that were previously only feasible for large productions. Sarandos 将这些用法分为两类：一类帮助团队更快看到创意雏形，另一类用于完成过去受预算、拍摄条件或视效工期限制的镜头。他说，低成本作品因此也能尝试以往只有大制作才能承担的视觉方案。

He also limited the boundaries of the tools to the production stages controlled by creators: narrative, performance, and aesthetic choices are still determined by directors, cinematographers, VFX artists, and post-production personnel, and AI is not an automated process that bypasses them. 他同时把工具的边界限定在创作者控制的制作环节：叙事、表演和审美选择仍由导演、摄影、视效和后期人员决定，AI 不是一套绕开他们的自动化流程。

We believe it will enhance creators' capabilities, not replace them.

item.title: 💡 阶跃星辰董事长印奇：智能体正从数字屏幕走向物理世界
item.guid: 💡-阶跃星辰董事长印奇：智能体正从数字屏幕走向物理世界
item.description:
On July 17, the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC 2026) opened. Yin Qi, Chairman of Jiyue Xingchen and Chairman of Qianli Technology, delivered a speech at the main forum of the conference, stating that with the improvement of model capabilities and the accelerated integration of intelligent agents with terminal products, AI is moving from digital screens to the physical world, and intelligent agents will also transform from chat tools into productivity units capable of perceiving, deciding, and executing tasks. 7 月 17 日，2026 世界人工智能大会（WAIC 2026）开幕。阶跃星辰董事长、千里科技董事长印奇在大会主论坛发表演讲称，随着模型能力提升和智能体与终端产品加速结合，AI 正从数字屏幕走向物理世界，智能体也将从聊天工具转变为能够感知、决策和执行任务的生产力单元。

Yin Qi stated that by 2026, models have gradually moved from being able to perform tasks for only a few seconds to working independently for dozens of hours, with programming becoming an important indicator for measuring changes in AI capabilities. He believes that in the future, professions such as engineers, designers, and researchers may all have exclusive intelligent agents, thereby enhancing individuals' ability to complete complex tasks. 印奇表示，2026 年模型已从只能执行数秒任务，逐步迈向独立工作数十小时，编程则成为衡量 AI 能力变化的重要指标。他认为，未来工程师、设计师和研究员等职业都可能拥有专属智能体，从而提升个人完成复杂工作的能力。

In his view, the development of intelligent agents will bring about three aspects of change: new systems, new carriers, and new networks. Agentic OS will connect models, data, tools, interfaces, and devices; computers, mobile phones, cars, and robots may become carriers for the same intelligent agent in different scenarios, enabling cross-terminal collaboration; and A2A networks will connect humans with intelligent agents and support identity authentication, capability collaboration, and transactions between intelligent agents. 在他看来，智能体的发展将带来新系统、新载体和新网络三方面变化。Agentic OS 将连接模型、数据、工具、接口和设备；电脑、手机、汽车和机器人则可能成为同一智能体在不同场景下的载体，实现跨终端协作；A2A 网络将连接人与智能体，并支持智能体之间的身份认证、能力协作和交易。

Yin Qi also pointed out that after intelligent agents enter the real world, issues such as trusted identity, access control, responsibility attribution, and behavior traceability need to be addressed. The future focus is not on machines replacing humans, but on humans and intelligence jointly expanding capabilities. 印奇同时指出，智能体进入现实世界后，还需要解决身份可信、权限控制、责任归属和行为追溯等问题。未来的重点不是机器替代人，而是人与智能共同完成能力扩展。

item.title: 千问与 Bose 展示首款 AI 耳夹式耳机、AI 眼镜将支持调用 Agent
item.guid: 千问与-Bose-展示首款-AI-耳夹式耳机、AI-眼镜将支持调用-Agent
item.description:
Qianwen showcased its first AI intelligent agent headphones on the first day of WAIC 2026. The product features an open-ear clip design, integrating the Qianwen assistant into an all-day wearable audio device, supporting functions such as simultaneous interpretation, meeting minutes, and health records. 千问在 WAIC 2026 首日展示首款 AI 智能体耳机。产品采用开放式耳夹设计，把千问助手放入可全天佩戴的音频设备，支持同声传译、会议纪要和健康记录等功能。

These headphones are jointly created by Qianwen and Bose, with the Bose acoustic team participating in tuning, balancing sound quality and comfort with an open ear-clip wearing style. Qianwen previously launched AI glasses, and this time extends intelligent agent interaction to headphone form, allowing voice assistants to remain continuously available in meetings, cross-language communication, and daily health records. 这款耳机由千问与 Bose 联合打造，Bose 声学团队参与调音，在开放式耳夹的佩戴方式下兼顾音质与舒适性。千问此前已经推出 AI 眼镜，此次将智能体交互扩展到耳机形态，让语音助手在会议、跨语言交流和日常健康记录中保持持续可用。

On the same day, Qianwen announced the upgrade of its AI glasses to intelligent agent glasses. After the upgrade, the glasses can call third-party Skill and Agent on demand, and new capabilities such as full-duplex voice, eye tracking, Always-on visual perception, and vital sign monitoring have been added. 同日，千问宣布将 AI 眼镜升级为智能体眼镜。升级后，眼镜可按需调用第三方 Skill 和 Agent，并新增全双工语音、眼动追踪、Always-on 视觉感知和体征监测等能力。

Through the upgraded full-duplex voice model, the glasses can listen and speak simultaneously, distinguishing between user commands and environmental conversations; with built-in PPG and temperature sensors, they can also measure data such as heart rate, blood oxygen, and HRV. 通过升级后的全双工语音模型，眼镜能够边听边说，并区分用户指令与环境对话；内置 PPG 和温度传感器后，还可测量心率、血氧和 HRV 等数据。

In terms of visual perception, the product incorporates eye tracking and an Always-on visual perception system. Qianwen has also partnered with Ant Group to launch iris verification. 在视觉感知方面，产品加入眼动追踪和 Always-on 视觉感知系统，千问还与蚂蚁集团合作推出虹膜核身。

item.title: 阶跃星辰智能体手机 STEPX Neo 亮相 WAIC 2026
item.guid: 阶跃星辰智能体手机-STEPX-Neo-亮相-WAIC-2026
item.description:
On July 17, the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) opened in Shanghai. Jiecun Terminal unveiled its first AI terminal, the large model native intelligent agent phone STEPX Neo, at the exhibition, demonstrating its intelligent interaction capabilities in scenarios such as local life services, mobile office, and travel. 7 月 17 日，2026 世界人工智能大会（WAIC）在上海开幕。阶跃终端携首款 AI 终端、大模型原生智能体手机 STEPX Neo 亮相展台，现场展示其在本地生活服务、移动办公和出行等场景中的智能交互能力。

The phone is equipped with the intelligent agent native operating system Step AOS, featuring Jiecun's new generation personal intelligent agent "Jiecun Amoo," attempting to integrate large model capabilities more deeply with software and hardware. 该手机搭载智能体原生操作系统 Step AOS，内置阶跃新一代个人智能体「阶跃 Amoo」，试图将大模型能力与软件、硬件进行更深度的整合。

In the live demonstration, users can inquire about travel plans by recognizing the screen, and Jiecun Amoo will coordinate with Ctrip to plan flights and hotels, while avoiding schedule conflicts; in local life scenarios, Jiecun Amoo can call Alipay to jump to complete subsequent operations in the form of information cards. 现场演示中，用户可以通过识屏询问出行计划，阶跃 Amoo 联动携程规划机票和酒店，并规避日程冲突；在本地生活场景中，阶跃 Amoo 则可以调用支付宝，以信息卡片形式跳转完成后续操作。

Compared to traditional voice assistants, Jiecun Terminal positions Jiecun Amoo as a personal intelligent agent with memory, decision-making, and execution capabilities, able to transform users' fragmented needs into continuous actions. 与传统语音助手相比，阶跃终端将阶跃 Amoo 定位为具备记忆、决策和执行能力的个人智能体，能够将用户的零散需求转化为连续行动。

item.title: 蚂蚁在 WAIC 展示 AI 应用、交易生态和技术底座三层布局
item.guid: 蚂蚁在-WAIC-展示-AI-应用、交易生态和技术底座三层布局
item.description:
Ant Group showcased a three-tier layout for intelligent agent commerce at WAIC 2026, covering user-facing AI applications, a transaction and service network for merchants and intelligent agents, and a technology foundation composed of models, embodied intelligence, databases, and security capabilities. 蚂蚁集团在 WAIC 2026 展示面向智能体商业的三层布局，覆盖面向用户的 AI 应用、供商家和智能体使用的交易与服务网络，以及模型、具身智能、数据库和安全能力组成的技术底座。

    Application Layer: The health application "Afu" has over 100 million users, handles over 10 million health consultations daily, and connects more than 5,000 hospitals and 300,000 doctors; the AI version of Alipay, "Abao," has entered public beta, allowing users to complete processes such as sending express mail, hailing taxis, ordering takeout, and checking provident funds through spoken commands.

    Business Ecosystem Layer: Alipay AI Payment includes AI Pay, AI Collect, AI Wallet, and Token Pay, supporting 300 million intelligent agent payments and adapting to 95% of general intelligent agent frameworks; Alipay AI Open Platform integrates over 8,000 services into the generation, distribution, interaction, and payment links.

    Technology Layer: The Bailin large model, LingBot 2.0 embodied model, OceanBase AI database, and AgentAegis security system jointly support applications; LingBot-VLA 2.0 has adapted to over 20 robot configurations from 17 manufacturers.

In offline scenarios, Alipay has upgraded 30 million "tap-to-interact" touchpoints into an operational network, where merchant Agent "Xiaoyu" can perform store analysis, marketing configuration, member management, and traffic distribution. Ant Digital Technologies also released Agentar 2.0, integrating the intelligent agent development platform into the Alipay AI Open Platform. 线下场景中，支付宝把 3000 万个「碰一下」触点升级为经营网络，商家 Agent「晓雨」可执行门店分析、营销配置、会员经营和流量分发。蚂蚁数科同时发布 Agentar 2.0，将智能体开发平台接入支付宝 AI 开放平台。

item.title: 联想在 WAIC 2026 展示企业智能体、具身智能与 AI 终端产品
item.guid: 联想在-WAIC-2026-展示企业智能体、具身智能与-AI-终端产品
item.description:
On July 17, Lenovo showcased products and solutions ranging from intelligent computing infrastructure and enterprise intelligent agents to AI terminals at WAIC, connecting token production, application, and value creation processes with hybrid AI. In the first batch of test results for the "Artificial Intelligence Terminal Intelligence Classification Standard," 42 Lenovo PCs, tablets, and mobile phones passed the L3 level test. 7 月 17 日，联想在 WAIC 现场展示了从智算基础设施、企业智能体到 AI 终端的产品与方案，并以混合式 AI 串联词元生产、应用和价值创造环节。《人工智能终端智能化分级标准》首批测试结果中，联想有 42 款 PC、平板和手机通过 L3 级测试。

    Intelligent Computing Foundation: The WanQuan Heterogeneous Intelligent Computing Platform V5.0 covers clusters from hundreds to tens of thousands of cards; the Wentian Supernode integrates computing, communication, and storage into a single logical node, with a single node capable of carrying 40 GPUs. Lenovo also publicly showcased for the first time the Wentian WR5219 G5, a 2U rack server equipped with the Blue Core LX500 processor.

    Enterprise Intelligent Agents: Lexiang 4.0 can continuously complete product inquiries, recommendations, orders, and after-sales tasks, with 7 million monthly active users and cumulative sales exceeding 5 billion yuan; after the deployment of the store humanoid robot "Lexiang No. 1," store visits increased by 109% month-on-month.

    Industry Scenarios: On-site data from the robot inspection solution shows efficiency improvements of over 30%, an increase in anomaly detection rate of 45%, and a reduction in human input of nearly 40%; the World Cup semi-automated offside detection solution uses ThinkStation P8 to process data collection and coordinate calculation, outputting judgment results within 3 seconds and generating VR animations in 20 seconds.

    Personal Terminals: Tianxi AI 4.0 dispatches tasks through device, edge, and cloud collaboration. Lenovo states that 80% of token consumption is completed locally on the device, with the remaining 20% handled by cloud collaboration.

item.title: 商汤在 WAIC 展示 U1 Pro 与具身智能方案
item.guid: 商汤在-WAIC-展示-U1-Pro-与具身智能方案
item.description:
SenseTime set up four exhibition areas at WAIC 2026: Future Life, Future Intelligent Computing, Future City, and Future Assistant, showcasing SenseNova U1 Pro, AI office and video creation tools, domestic computing power scheduling, urban intelligent agents, and embodied robot solutions. 商汤在 WAIC 2026 设置未来生活、未来智算、未来城市和未来助手四个展区，展示日日新 SenseNova U1 Pro、AI 办公与视频创作工具、国产算力调度、城市智能体和具身机器人方案。

U1 Pro unifies understanding, generation, and action into a single model, addressing the complete process from content generation to task delivery. U1 Pro 把理解、生成和行动统一到同一模型中，面向从内容生成到任务交付的完整流程。

    Application Products: Little Raccoon products have over 20 million users, serving tens of thousands of enterprises; AI video creation Agent Seko brings together over 1 million creators and 1,300 enterprise clients, with its 3.0 version workbench covering topic selection, scriptwriting, production, and multi-language finished videos; Kapi products have accumulated over 40 million users.

    Intelligent Computing Foundation: SenseTime states that the large-scale device, through heterogeneous hybrid inference and unified scheduling, has increased the MFU of mainstream domestic chips by 85% to 152%, achieving an inference cost-performance ratio 1.25 times that of NVIDIA's H-series, and increasing token output by 2.5 times at the same cost.

    Embodied Intelligence: Robots equipped with the Kairos Enlightenment World Model can perform near real-time inference on consumer-grade terminals, completing long-range tasks such as making breakfast and tidying up the house; the three solutions "Xiaoman," "Xiaotu," and "Xiaoxin" are designed for instant retail, park inspection, and hotel laundry, respectively.

SenseTime also simultaneously set up SenseMart Go robot stores at the Expo Exhibition Hall, Pudong Expo Park, and West Bund International Convention and Exhibition Center. Robots can autonomously complete tasks such as picking and placing goods, organizing shelves, and inventory counting, suitable for offline scenarios like supermarkets, office buildings, industrial parks, and scenic spots. 商汤还在世博展览馆、浦东世博天地和西岸国际会展中心同步设置 SenseMart Go 机器人商店。机器人可以自主完成取放商品、整理货架和盘点库存，用于商超、写字楼、园区与景区等线下场景。

item.title: 网易灵动在 WAIC 展示远程操控挖掘机器人与无人装载机
item.guid: 网易灵动在-WAIC-展示远程操控挖掘机器人与无人装载机
item.description:
NetEase Lingdong showcased its "Lingzai" loading robot, "Lingjue" excavation robot, and remote intelligent cockpit at WAIC yesterday. On-site staff connected to remote power plant and port equipment through the cockpit; the company stated that these two types of engineering robots have been operating routinely in over 100 projects across more than ten provinces nationwide, completing over 700,000 safe operations. 网易灵动昨日在 WAIC 展示「灵载」装载机器人、「灵掘」挖掘机器人和远程智能座舱。现场工作人员通过座舱连接远端电厂与港口设备；公司称，两类工程机器人已在全国十余个省份、超过 100 个项目中常态运行，累计完成超过 70 万次安全作业。

    A closed coal yard in Zhejiang uses loading robots for continuous coal supply, with operators taking over remotely when coal pile temperatures are abnormal;

    Port hold cleaning equipment utilizes 3D pose perception and digital twin technology for autonomous shoveling and loading;

    Excavation robots at an open-pit coal mine in Inner Mongolia achieve 80% of the loading efficiency of skilled human labor, with nearly 70% of operation time requiring no human intervention;

    After 11 months of continuous operation, an unmanned loader at a beam yard in Jiaxing has taken over 98.4% of production tasks, with an automation task success rate exceeding 97%.

NetEase Lingdong also showcased the "Shepherd" solution for one person supervising multiple machines and the "Dark Factory" solution for operations without external light sources; the latter's reported on-site data shows a comprehensive efficiency of 120% compared to skilled human labor, a 15% reduction in energy consumption, and a 70% decrease in single-site labor load. 网易灵动还展示了「牧羊人」一人监管多机和无外部光源作业的「黑灯工地」方案；后者公布的现场数据为综合效率达到熟练人工的 120%、能耗降低 15%、单站点人力负荷下降 70%。

item.title: 中国气象局发布「妈祖」风云卫星 AI 工具箱
item.guid: 中国气象局发布「妈祖」风云卫星-AI-工具箱
item.description:
Yesterday, the China Meteorological Administration released the "Mazu" Fengyun Satellite AI Toolbox at the WAIC 2026 Meteorological Theme Sub-forum, integrating Fengyun meteorological satellite comprehensive observation data with AI models into a satellite application solution for international users. 中国气象局昨日在 WAIC 2026 气象主题分论坛发布「妈祖」风云卫星 AI 工具箱，把风云气象卫星综合观测数据与 AI 模型整合为面向国际用户的卫星应用方案。

In the next 5 years, "Mazu" plans to be implemented in 30 countries; it has currently entered Pakistan, Ethiopia, Solomon Islands, Jordan, Sri Lanka, Mongolia, and Djibouti, and offers cloud-based trials to over 40 countries worldwide. 未来 5 年，「妈祖」计划在 30 个国家落地；目前已进入巴基斯坦、埃塞俄比亚、所罗门群岛、约旦、斯里兰卡、蒙古国和吉布提，并向全球 40 多个国家提供云端试用。

"Mazu" corresponds to four English keywords: multi-hazard, early warning, zero-gap, and inclusive, covering risk assessment, monitoring and early warning, information dissemination, and emergency response. 「妈祖」对应多灾种、预警、零差距和普惠四个英文关键词，覆盖风险评估、监测预警、信息传播和应急响应。

item.title: 德国 Soofi S 开放 300 亿参数双语模型与训练配方
item.guid: 德国-Soofi-S-开放-300-亿参数双语模型与训练配方
item.description:
Yesterday, the German Soofi Alliance released Soofi S 30B-A3B. The model uses a hybrid MoE and Mamba-Transformer architecture, with a total of 30 billion parameters, activating approximately 3 billion parameters per token; training used about 27 trillion tokens, and the proportion of German materials was increased in later training stages. 昨天，德国 Soofi 联盟发布 Soofi S 30B-A3B。模型采用 MoE 与 Mamba-Transformer 混合架构，总参数 300 亿，每个 token 激活约 30 亿参数；训练使用约 27 万亿 token，并提高了德语材料在后期训练中的比例。

The project completed training on Deutsche Telekom's Industrial AI Cloud in Munich, using up to 512 NVIDIA B200 GPUs. The team committed to open-sourcing model weights, some intermediate checkpoints, training and evaluation code, hyperparameters, and data descriptions categorized by source; the paper reports that it surpasses multiple European open models in comprehensive evaluations across German, English, and code. 项目在德国电信慕尼黑的 Industrial AI Cloud 上完成训练，使用最多 512 张 NVIDIA B200。团队承诺开放模型权重、部分中间检查点、训练和评测代码、超参数以及按来源统计的数据说明；论文报告称，它在德语、英语和代码综合评测中超过多款欧洲开放模型。

item.title: 华为体脂秤接入阿福 App，加入「科学减重一亿斤」
item.guid: 华为体脂秤接入阿福-App，加入「科学减重一亿斤」
item.description:
Ant Afu officially announced yesterday that Huawei body fat scales have been integrated with the Afu App. After users authorize "Huawei Health" within the App, they can synchronize data such as weight and body fat to Afu. Currently, it supports Huawei Smart Body Fat Scale 3 Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and Pro versions; completing the binding allows users to receive a 10 yuan payment red packet. 蚂蚁阿福昨日官宣，华为体脂秤已与阿福 App 打通。用户在 App 内授权「华为运动健康」后，可把体重、体脂等数据同步至阿福，现阶段支持华为智能体脂秤 3 蓝牙版、Wi-Fi 版和 Pro 版；完成绑定可领取 10 元支付红包。

After integration, Huawei body fat scale users can join the "Scientific Weight Loss of 100 Million Jin" activity. According to official data, since the activity launched on June 22nd, over 1 million people have participated in claiming scales, over 800,000 people have checked in on scales, and a cumulative weight loss of over 1.35 million jin has been achieved. 接入后，华为体脂秤的用户可加入「科学减重一亿斤」活动。据官方数据，活动自 6 月 22 日启动后，已有超过 100 万人参与领秤，超过 80 万人上秤打卡，累计减重超过 135 万斤。

Afu had previously partnered with Wolai Technology to provide body fat scales and introduced weight management content from Bohu Health. The company stated that it would continue to upgrade AI's interpretation of body data and personalized weight management recommendations. 阿福此前已与沃莱科技合作提供体脂秤，并引入薄荷健康的体重管理内容。公司称，后续会继续升级 AI 对身体数据的解读和个性化体重管理建议。

item.title: One Fun Thing｜这台机器人头掉了，还在擂台上继续出拳
item.guid: One-Fun-Thing｜这台机器人头掉了，还在擂台上继续出拳
item.description:
On the evening of July 16th, the Zhongqing URKL Global Humanoid Robot Free Fighting League kicked off in Shenzhen. During the match, one robot had its head kicked off by an opponent, but it didn't stop, continuing to punch using its core system in the torso, and managed to finish the match. 7 月 16 日晚，众擎 URKL 全球人形机器人自由格斗联赛在深圳开打。比赛中，一台机器人被对手踢掉了头，但它没有停下来，依靠躯干里的核心系统继续出拳，硬是把比赛打完了。

The match adopted a 1V1, 5-round format, with each round lasting 5 minutes. Ultimately, the black mecha "Matador" defeated the white mecha "Eagle" with a score of 3:2. Action actor Donnie Yen, who attended the match, stated that he had only seen robot combat in sci-fi movies before, and watching a real duel up close this time felt "very shocking." 这场比赛采用 1V1、5 回合赛制，每回合 5 分钟。最终，黑色机甲「斗牛士」以 3:2 击败白色机甲「雄鹰」。到场观赛的动作演员甄子丹表示，自己过去只在科幻电影里见过机器人格斗，这次近距离观看真实对决，感觉「很震撼」。

URKL attracted more than 200 teams from over 10 countries to register, with 32 teams ultimately qualifying. The grand finals are expected to be held from December this year to January next year, with a prize pool of 14 million yuan. The champion will also receive a pure gold belt worth approximately 10 million yuan or equivalent prize money. URKL 吸引了来自 10 余个国家的 200 多支队伍报名，最终 32 支队伍晋级。总决赛预计在今年 12 月至明年 1 月举行，奖金池为 1400 万元，冠军还将获得价值约 1000 万元的纯金腰带或等值奖金。

item.title: 周末看什么｜《镜的第三乐章》
item.guid: 周末看什么｜《镜的第三乐章》
item.description:
The Third Movement of the Mirror is directed and written by Christian Petzold, starring Paula Beer and Barbara Auer. It has a runtime of 86 minutes and was selected for the Directors' Fortnight section of the Cannes Film Festival in 2025. 《镜的第三乐章》由克里斯蒂安·佩措尔德执导、编剧，葆拉·贝尔、巴尔巴拉·奥尔主演，片长 86 分钟，2025 年入围戛纳电影节导演双周单元。

The film tells the story of piano student Laura, who survives a car accident in which her boyfriend dies, and is then taken home by witness Betty to be cared for. She gradually integrates into the family, but her peaceful life is soon shattered by trauma, grief, and identity projection. The film uses Ravel's 'Miroirs' (Mirrors), Third Movement, 'Une barque sur l'océan' (A Boat on the Ocean), to discuss emotional attachment, family relationships, and self-healing after loss. 影片讲述钢琴学生劳拉在车祸中幸存、男友身亡后，被目击者贝蒂带回家照料。她逐渐融入这个家庭，但平静生活很快被创伤、悲痛和身份投射打破。影片借拉威尔《镜》第三乐章《海上孤舟》，讨论失去之后的情感依附、家庭关系与自我修复。

Regarding ratings, Douban scored 7.3 based on 7,171 reviews; MUBI scored 7.4 / 10 based on 1,719 ratings; Rotten Tomatoes critics' freshness was 95%. The film generally excels in restrained, ambiguous psychological narration, but its slow pace and open-ended expression might leave audiences who prefer strong plots feeling unsatisfied. 评分方面，豆瓣为 7.3 分，基于 7,171 人评价；MUBI 为 7.4 / 10，基于 1,719 人评分；烂番茄影评人新鲜度为 95%。影片整体以克制、暧昧的心理叙事见长，但缓慢节奏和开放式表达可能令偏好强情节的观众感到不足。

item.title: 买书不读指南｜《天书奇谭》
item.guid: 买书不读指南｜《天书奇谭》
item.description:
Tsinghua University architectural historian Jia Jun's 'A Heavenly Book of Wonders' (Tian Shu Qi Tan) is published by SDX Joint Publishing Company. The book is divided into two volumes, upper and lower, containing 18 articles and approximately 278 illustrations. 清华大学建筑史学者贾珺的《天书奇谭》由生活·读书·新知三联书店出版，全书分上下两卷、18 篇文章，配有约 278 幅图片。

This book correlates classics of Chinese and Western architectural history with the martial arts systems in Jin Yong's novels: Vitruvius's 'De architectura' (Ten Books on Architecture) is likened to a 'Shaolin Grandmaster' combining the 'Yi Jin Jing' and the Seventy-two Shaolin Ultimate Skills; Li Jie's compiled 'Yingzao Fashi' (Treatise on Architectural Methods) is compared to the highly esteemed and profound 'Nine Yin Manual'. 本书将中西建筑史经典与金庸小说中的武学体系对应起来：维特鲁威的《建筑十书》被比作融合《易筋经》和少林七十二绝技的「少林宗师」；李诫编修的《营造法式》则被比作地位崇高、内容深奥的《九阴真经》。

Each article adopts a writing style of 'interplay between reality and fiction, contrasting two gems': on one hand, it introduces real architectural classics, schools, and theoretical concepts; on the other, it draws analogies using the martial arts settings in Jin Yong's works. This approach is not merely for entertainment but attempts to lower the reading threshold for professional architectural knowledge by leveraging readers' existing cultural experiences. 每篇文章都采用「虚实相生、双璧对照」的写法：一方面介绍真实存在的建筑典籍、建筑流派与理论概念，另一方面借助金庸作品中的武学设定进行类比。这种写法并非单纯追求趣味，而是试图通过读者已有的文化经验，降低建筑专业知识的阅读门槛。

item.title: 游戏推荐｜《加利宅邸悬案》
item.guid: 游戏推荐｜《加利宅邸悬案》
item.description:
The Case of the Gali Mansion is adapted from the critically acclaimed text game 'Type Help' and re-created by the team behind 'The Lutra Family Died', adding fully illustrated visual novel performances, professional voice acting, a 3D memory interactive interface, original soundtrack, as well as new content, puzzles, and branching routes. 《加利宅邸悬案》改编自广受好评的文字游戏《Type Help》，并由《鲁特里一家死了》的团队重新打造，加入全插图视觉小说演出、专业配音、3D 记忆交互界面、原创配乐，以及新的内容、谜题和分支路线。

The game's story takes place on March 7, 1936. Locals arrive at the long-abandoned Gali Mansion and discover the scene left by severe atrocities inside. Although the police intervened to investigate and clear the crime scene, they were never able to reconstruct what happened that night. 游戏故事发生于 1936 年 3 月 7 日。当地人来到一座荒废多年的加利宅邸，在屋内发现了严重暴行留下的现场。警方虽介入调查并清理了犯罪现场，但始终未能还原那个夜晚发生的事情。

Years later, the player acquires a mysterious device capable of listening to 'echoes of the past', and must use the remaining memory clues to gradually piece together character relationships, the course of events, and the truth of the case. 多年后，玩家获得一台能够聆听「过去回响」的神秘装置，需要借助其中残留的记忆线索，逐步拼接人物关系、事件经过与案件真相。

Currently, the game has received 'Overwhelmingly Positive' reviews on Steam, with 96% of 697 user reviews being positive; the page shows an initial discount price of ¥ 68.40, with the offer valid until July 22, 2026. 目前，游戏在 Steam 收获「好评如潮」评价，697 篇用户评测中有 96% 给出好评；页面显示的首发优惠价为 ¥ 68.40，优惠截至 2026 年 7 月 22 日。
